'''wamaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mic|mic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mic|mic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wamaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæmæhæth|wæmæhæth]] || [[word:wæmæhæj|wæmæhæj]] || [[word:wæmæhæsh|wæmæhæsh]] || [[word:wæmæhæ|wæmæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wamamahath|wamamahath]] || [[word:wamamahaj|wamamahaj]] || [[word:wamamahash|wamamahash]] || [[word:wamamaha|wamamaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wamahath|wamahath]] || [[word:wamahaj|wamahaj]] || [[word:wamahash|wamahash]] || [[word:wamaha|wamaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wamafhath|wamafhath]] || [[word:wamafhaj|wamafhaj]] || [[word:wamafhash|wamafhash]] || [[word:wamafhaf|wamafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wamahatha|wamahatha]] || [[word:wamahaja|wamahaja]] || [[word:wamahasha|wamahasha]] || [[word:wamahaka|wamahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wamahath|wamahath]] || [[word:wamahaj|wamahaj]] || [[word:wamahash|wamahash]] || [[word:wamaha|wamaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wamahathal|wamahathal]] || [[word:wamahajal|wamahajal]] || [[word:wamahashal|wamahashal]] || [[word:wamahakal|wamahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wamahathatha|wamahathatha]] || [[word:wamahajaja|wamahajaja]] || [[word:wamahashasha|wamahashasha]] || [[word:wamahaka|wamahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wamahathan|wamahathan]] || [[word:wamahajan|wamahajan]] || [[word:wamahashan|wamahashan]] || [[word:wamahakan|wamahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wamahathaoro|wamahathaoro]] || [[word:wamahajaoro|wamahajaoro]] || [[word:wamahashaoro|wamahashaoro]] || [[word:wamahakaoro|wamahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
